panels.description: Same `PivotedStatTable` panel, different dataset: a 40-row sample of `car_price_dataset.csv` reshaped so every car becomes a row. Brand → Fuel type → Car. Try aggregating by Brand to see fleet-wide averages, or hide the Fuel-type dimension to compare brands directly.
